title: Combat QOL
description: A simple mod, that displays some information about the entity the player is looking at.
body:
**⚠️IMPORTANT⚠️** 

This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).

<hr>

**Mod Description:**

What this mod adds, is simply a _modification to Minecraft's Action Bar_, so that it displays some information about entities that players are looking at. 

Information Displayed:
- Name of Entity
- Health
- Max Health
- Absorption
- Armor
- Air
- Max Air

<hr>   
   
   **EXTRA:** This mod also adds a subtitle, that only appears when the entity that the player is looking at, has 0 H.P. The subtitle mentioned in the previous sentence displays what mob you killed (like: "<entityName> has been killed!"). Also, when you kill an entity (if you are looking at it), a DING sound plays once to the player.

<hr>


**Mod Demonstration Video:**

<iframe width="500" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/5BRT6f9Tw6E" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
